sentences.target: お菓子は全部で十個あります。
sentences.reading: おかしはぜんぶでじゅうこあります。

translations.en: There are ten snacks in total.
translations.fr: Il y a dix snacks au total.
translations.it: Ci sono dieci snack in totale.
translations.vi: Tổng cộng có mười món ăn nhẹ.
translations.nl: Er zijn in totaal tien snacks.
translations.da: Der er i alt ti snacks.

tokens.explanation: Refers to sweet snacks; serves as the topic of the sentence.
Topic marker highlighting 'お菓子' as what the sentence is about.
Indicates the total quantity under discussion.
Marks '全部' adverbially to mean 'in total'.
Specifies the quantity as ten.
Counter for small objects, used here to count sweets.
Polite verb indicating the existence of inanimate objects (the sweets).

sentences.target: りんごは全部で三つあります。
sentences.reading: りんごはぜんぶでみっつあります。

translations.en: There are three apples in total.
translations.fr: Il y a trois pommes au total.
translations.it: Ci sono tre mele in totale.
translations.vi: Tổng cộng có ba quả táo.
translations.nl: Er zijn in totaal drie appels.
translations.da: Der er i alt tre æbler.

tokens.explanation: Refers to apples; the topic of the sentence.
Topic marker highlighting 'りんご' as what the sentence is about.
Indicates the total quantity under discussion.
Marks '全部' adverbially to mean 'in total'.
Specifies the quantity as three.
General counter used here to count apples.
Polite verb indicating the existence of inanimate objects (the apples).

sentences.target: これを買うと、全部で千五百円になります。
sentences.reading: これをかうと、ぜんぶでせんごひゃくえんになります。

translations.en: If you buy these, it will be 1,500 yen in total.
translations.es: Si compras estos, serán 1.500 yenes en total.
translations.fr: Si vous achetez ceux-ci, cela coûtera 1 500 yens au total.
translations.de: Wenn du diese kaufst, kostet es insgesamt 1.500 Yen.
translations.it: Se li acquisti, costerà in totale 1.500 yen.
translations.zh-Hans: 如果你买这些，总共是1500日元。
translations.yue: 如果你買呢啲，一共要1,500日圓。
translations.ru: Если вы купите их, общая сумма составит 1 500 йен.
translations.pt: Se você comprar esses, vai custar 1.500 ienes no total.
translations.he: אם תקנה את אלה, זה יהיה בסך הכל 1,500 ין.
translations.vi: Nếu bạn mua những thứ này, tổng cộng sẽ là 1.500 yên.
translations.ar: إذا اشتريت هذه، سيكون المجموع 1500 ين.
translations.nl: Als je deze koopt, is het in totaal 1.500 yen.
translations.uk: Якщо купите це, загальна сума буде 1 500 єн.
translations.hu: Ha ezeket megveszed, összesen 1 500 jenbe kerül.
translations.hi: यदि आप इन्हें खरीदते हैं, तो यह कुल मिलाकर 1,500 येन होगा।
translations.pl: Jeśli je kupisz, będzie to 1500 jenów łącznie.
translations.el: Εάν τα αγοράσετε, θα είναι συνολικά 1.500 γιεν.
translations.nb: Hvis du kjøper disse, blir det totalt 1 500 yen.
translations.id: Jika Anda membeli ini, totalnya akan menjadi 1.500 yen.
translations.sv: Om du köper dessa blir det totalt 1 500 yen.
translations.ro: Dacă le cumperi, va costa în total 1.500 yeni.
translations.cs: Pokud je koupíte, bude to celkem 1 500 jenů.
translations.da: Hvis du køber disse, bliver det i alt 1.500 yen.
translations.fi: Jos ostat nämä, kokonaishinta on 1 500 jeniä.

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun referring to the item being purchased.
Marks 'これ' as the direct object of the verb '買う'.
Dictionary-form verb meaning 'to buy'.
Conditional particle meaning 'when' or 'if'.
Indicates the total amount in question.
Marks '全部' to indicate the total as a whole.
Numeral specifying the amount of money (1,500).
Currency unit 'yen'.
Particle marking the resulting state or amount.
Polite form of 'なる' meaning 'to become' or 'to amount to'.

sentences.target: 図書館には本が全部で百冊あります。
sentences.reading: としょかんにはほんがぜんぶでひゃくさつあります。

translations.en: There are 100 books in total in the library.
translations.es: En total hay 100 libros en la biblioteca.
translations.fr: La bibliothèque compte au total 100 livres.
translations.de: Insgesamt gibt es 100 Bücher in der Bibliothek.
translations.it: In totale ci sono 100 libri in biblioteca.
translations.pt: Há 100 livros no total na biblioteca.
translations.vi: Có tổng cộng 100 cuốn sách trong thư viện.
translations.nl: In totaal zijn er 100 boeken in de bibliotheek.
translations.pl: W bibliotece znajduje się łącznie 100 książek.
translations.nb: Det finnes totalt 100 bøker i biblioteket.
translations.sv: Det finns totalt 100 böcker i biblioteket.
translations.ro: În bibliotecă se află în total 100 de cărți.
translations.da: Der er i alt 100 bøger i biblioteket.

tokens.explanation: Refers to the library; location for the following existence.
Locative particle indicating where something exists.
Topic marker emphasizing the location as the context.
Refers to books; the subject of existence.
Subject particle marking '本' as existing.
Indicates the total number of books.
Marks '全部' to indicate the total as a whole.
Specifies the quantity as one hundred.
Counter for books, marking the unit of counting.
Polite verb indicating the existence of inanimate objects (the books).

図書館には本が全部で百冊あります。

としょかんにはほんがぜんぶでひゃくさつあります。
